# JPN Toolset

This is a collection of tools that help me learn the Japanese language.

This repository contains a couple of mini-projects — mostly simple Python programs and scripts.

It mainly uses FOSS tools:

* web search for kanji definitions
* a simple on-screen kanji keyboard prototyped with *PyGTK*
* auto-generated Japanese transcriptions from `.wav` files using *Whisper*
* extracting audio and remuxing `.mkv` containers with *ffmpeg* and MKVToolNix tools
